_comment: Rules for the /hunt cycle. COPY this to hunt-config.json in your JobSearch dir and edit. Conservative defaults to limit LinkedIn ban risk. Fill every <PLACEHOLDER>.

runMode._note: AUTONOMOUS requires you to run Claude Code with bypass-permissions and to explicitly want unattended auto-apply. Strong matches (score >= autoApplyThreshold) are auto-submitted with a Telegram update each; borderline (approvalThreshold..autoApplyThreshold) are sent to Telegram for Approve/Reject; rest discarded. Set autoApply=false for HYBRID mode (discover + ask only, never auto-submit). Safety rails always enforced: caps, randomized delays, JD-reading quality gate, never enter passwords/accounts/payment, skip unknown sensitive free-text.

scoring._note: Score 0-100 (fit vs your PROFILE.md). >=85 auto-submit; 65-84 push you for approval; <65 discard.

safetyRails._note: If the STOP file exists, the cycle does nothing. Rate limits + randomized delays make automation look less bot-like.

match._excludeJobTypes_note: For permanent/full-time only. Check the job's type tag AND title/JD; skip if it's contract/part-time/intern/temp/freelance/AI-trainer gig.
match._note: Tune includeTitles/excludePatterns/maxYearsExperienceRequired to your level and target roles.

applicantPriority._note: To chase the 'first 100 applicants' edge: prioritize postings <24h old and showing <100 applicants. Apply to freshest first.

sources._note: Where to search and how to act. AUTO-APPLY only on LinkedIn Easy Apply + Naukri one-click (proven). Everything else = SEND-LINK: a strong match's link is sent to Telegram for you to apply from your phone.

linkedinExternal._note: Non-Easy-Apply LinkedIn roles (redirect to company/ATS site).

naukri._note: WORKS via your AUTHENTICATED Chrome (logged in -> Akamai allows; headless gets blocked). Search naukri.com job URLs in controlled tab, read JD, score. ROUTING for strong matches: direct Naukri one-click Apply -> AUTO-APPLY (submits saved profile/resume; if a chatbot/screening modal appears, answer from applicationDefaults, else skip+send-link). Apply on company site (external) -> SEND-LINK. Counts toward dailyAutoApplyCap. If Akamai block appears, skip Naukri that cycle.

indeed._note: Use the Indeed CONNECTOR tools (mcp__claude_ai_Indeed__*), NOT the browser (Cloudflare-blocked). Read-only: search Indeed + send matching links to Telegram for manual apply. Requires the Indeed connector to be enabled in Claude.

wellfound._note: AngelList/Wellfound startups - more junior-friendly than LinkedIn. Needs you logged in (authenticated Chrome). DISCOVERY + SEND-LINK (apply = message-to-founder form, varies). If not logged in / blocked, skip. Set enabled=true once you have an account.

instahyre._note: Needs you logged in. Mostly recruiter-reachout model; DISCOVERY + SEND-LINK strong matches. Skip if not logged in.

cutshort._note: Needs you logged in with an up-to-date profile. DISCOVERY + SEND-LINK. Skip if not logged in.

applicationDefaults._note: Standard answers for LinkedIn Easy Apply / Naukri screening questions. Comp/notice fields are NUMERIC on LinkedIn — enter plain numbers (no 'LPA'/'days' text or it errors). Fill these with YOUR real, honest values.
